SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?player ?team ?season WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P54 ?team .
  ?team wdt:P5138 ?season .
  ?player wdt:P1351 ?goals
}
```
